justification: The diff successfully migrates from Java 8/Jakarta EE 8 to Java 21/Jakarta EE 10, updating compiler targets, dependencies (Hibernate 6, Jersey 3, JUnit 5), and package imports (javax.* -> jakarta.*). It also adopts Java 21 idioms like String.formatted() and List.getFirst(). However, diff coherence is reduced by the addition of unrelated dependencies (spring-boot-starter-validation, hamcrest-junit) and inconsistent indentation in pom.xml and persistence.xml, which introduces spurious churn.
